seoTitle: How to Create an AI Voice Agent for GoHighLevel
metaDescription: Learn how to build an AI voice agent in GoHighLevel to automate customer inquiries and improve response times around the clock.
intro: An AI voice agent in GoHighLevel can handle customer inquiries automatically, freeing up your team to focus on more complex tasks while still keeping response times fast. This guide covers the creation process, practical use cases, and how this fits into a broader automation strategy. It's designed for small business owners, marketing professionals, and tech enthusiasts curious about bringing AI into their customer service operations.

steps.heading: Get an overview of AI voice agents
steps.body: Understand what an AI voice agent can do within GoHighLevel before starting the creation process, so you know how it fits your business.

steps.heading: Review GoHighLevel's relevant features
steps.body: Familiarize yourself with the tools and settings in GoHighLevel that support building and managing an AI voice agent.

steps.heading: Follow the step-by-step creation process
steps.body: Work through the setup steps to build your AI voice agent, configuring it to handle the type of interactions you need.

steps.heading: Apply use cases for AI voice agents
steps.body: Consider practical applications like handling customer inquiries around the clock in sectors such as real estate, sales, or customer support.

steps.heading: Explore resources for further learning
steps.body: As you get comfortable with the basics, look for additional resources to refine and expand what your AI voice agent can handle.

faq.question: Can an AI voice agent handle customer inquiries at any time?
faq.answer: Yes, one of the main benefits highlighted is that an AI voice agent can handle inquiries around the clock, not just during business hours.

faq.question: Do I need technical experience to build an AI voice agent?
faq.answer: No, the video is designed to be approachable for beginners while still offering value to more experienced users.

faq.question: Which industries can benefit from an AI voice agent?
faq.answer: Sectors like real estate, sales, and customer support are highlighted as strong use cases for this feature.

faq.question: How does an AI voice agent fit into broader automation?
faq.answer: It aligns with modern automation practices by promoting greater efficiency and user engagement alongside your other GoHighLevel workflows.

faq.question: Is this feature useful for small businesses specifically?
faq.answer: Yes, small business owners as well as larger organizations can use an AI voice agent to enhance their customer service capacity.
